data.body: ad44 IMPLEMENTED (sonnet, 1 attempt) + validated: 42 held-out tests GREEN (live-shape in-sync via canonical mapping, assignee identity accountId/email/displayName, RAW jira_value on divergence, rebar-status annotation-label precedence B3 improvement, no spurious truncation warning, AST import gate + path-literal AST-string-constant sweep). Mutation teeth: negate assignee match -> 3 tests RED. Reuses 625b outbound_field_diff._assignee_matches + map_fields_to_remote; injection seam; migrated existing reconcile_check tests. Preflight: lint+mypy(377)+env-vars(no diff)+module-size+1412 unit+81 integration. Committed f72deaa20, pushed. UNION NEUTRALITY GATE now covers ALL core modules (fetcher/applier/apply_handlers/_attestation/inbound_probe/outbound_differ/outbound_links/reconcile_check) — epic bbf1 AC3/AC4 complete, single inbound_fields.py exemption.
